on_train.description: If a passenger loses an item on board, they should inform the train conductor or platform staff at the earliest opportunity.
on_train.contact_method: Report via in-app chat, customer service email, or station help desk.
on_train.response_time: Customer service will acknowledge reports within 2 business days.

at_station.description: Lost items found at stations are handed to the station's lost property office.
at_station.where_to_enquire: Enquiries should be made in person at the station lost property desk, via the app, or by calling customer service.
at_station.note: Items not claimed within 28 days may be donated to charity, disposed of, or handed to local authorities, at the operator's discretion.

on_train.description: Items found on trains by staff or other passengers should be handed to the train conductor or deposited at the next station's lost property desk.
on_train.passenger_obligation: Passengers who find items are encouraged to hand them in rather than remove them from the train.

collection.description: Passengers collecting lost property must provide a valid photo ID and describe the item accurately before collection.
collection.collection_hours: During staffed station hours. Contact the relevant station in advance to confirm opening times.

valuable_items.special_handling: High-value or sensitive items (passports, large amounts of cash, medication) are logged separately and stored securely. The passenger will be contacted directly if contact details are available from the booking.
valuable_items.law_enforcement: Items of significant value or items believed to be connected to criminal activity will be handed to local law enforcement.

liability.operator_liability: The operator is not liable for lost, damaged, or stolen items left on trains or at stations. Passengers are responsible for their own belongings at all times.
liability.insurance: Passengers are advised to ensure valuable items are covered by appropriate personal travel insurance.

perishable_items.description: Perishable items (food, medication requiring refrigeration, etc.) that cannot be safely stored will be disposed of immediately.
